message:
test(unit): expand inline tests for command_guard, tantivy_query (+61) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

command_guard.rs: +29 tests — TrustLevel (Debug/Clone/Copy/Display/Default/serde/Hash/Eq),
GuardDecision (Debug/Clone/serde all variants, accessor methods), PaneGuardConfig/GuardPolicy
(Debug/Clone/Default/serde), AuditEntry (Debug/Clone/serde), CommandGuard (with_defaults,
policy accessor, set_policy, clear_audit, evaluate_timed, set_pane_config, audit pane_id).

tantivy_query.rs: +32 tests — SearchQuery (Debug/Clone/boost defaults/with_cursor),
SearchSortOrder (Debug/Clone/Default/serde), SortField (Debug/Copy/serde all), TieBreakKey
(Debug/Clone/Eq, ordering by timestamp/sequence), Pagination (Debug/Clone/Default/serde),
PaginationCursor (Debug/Clone/Eq/serde), SnippetConfig (Debug/Clone/Default/serde), Snippet
(Debug/Clone/Eq/serde), SearchResults (Debug/Clone/empty/serde), SearchError (Debug/Display/
Error), InMemorySearchService (Default/add), EventDirection (Debug/Copy/serde).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
